title: Message Grouping Component
description: Build a chat message list that intelligently groups messages by sender and time.
instructions:
Create a ChatMessageList widget that:

1. Groups consecutive messages from the same sender:
   - Show sender avatar only on the first message in a group
   - Show timestamp only on the last message (or first if group has 1 message)
   - Messages within 2 minutes of each other are grouped

2. Different styling for sent vs received:
   - Sent messages: right-aligned, primary color background
   - Received messages: left-aligned, neutral background

3. Features:
   - Auto-scroll to bottom when new messages arrive
   - 'Scroll to bottom' button when user scrolls up
   - Pull-to-refresh to load older messages
   - Smooth animations when new messages appear

Use ListView.builder for performance with long chat histories.

hints.text: Create a MessageGroup class that holds consecutive messages from one sender.
Use itemBuilder to determine if a message is first, last, or middle in its group and style accordingly.
Use AnimatedList or add a fade-in animation to new messages for a polished feel.
